text:
なるほどな……
まずは弱点のコアを狙うってわけか。
そして弱点を露出させて、叩く。

これなら確かに倒せるかもしれない。
次に会った時は真っ先に狙うよ。

やっぱ、センパイは凄いな……
ホント、そう思うよ。

またさ、相談に乗ってくれよな。
ありがとな、センパ

Oh, okay. So first you need to go for the
weakspot in that core of theirs, huh? Then
once it's out in the open, you let 'em have it.

Yeah, that makes sense, and I think I might be
able to pull it off.
I'll give it a shot next time I run into one.

I know I've said it a thousand times, but you're
really something, boss.

You'll come around and help me again
sometime, right? Thanks, boss.
